sourceLabel: Henley Passport Index (Feb 2026) + official embassy/IATA sources
notes: Access types for ordinary Indian passport holders travelling for tourism. 'usVisaPerk' describes easier entry for Indians who also hold a valid US visa or green card. Entries with todo:true must be verified against the destination's official immigration site before go-live. Visa rules change frequently — always re-check before booking.

countries.name: Nepal
countries.notes: Open border; Indian citizens can enter with a passport or voter ID.

countries.name: Bhutan
countries.notes: Entry permit on arrival with Indian passport or voter ID; SDF fee applies.

countries.name: Sri Lanka
countries.notes: Free ETA for Indian nationals (extended through 2026).

countries.name: Maldives
countries.notes: Free visa on arrival with confirmed booking and funds.

countries.name: Thailand
countries.notes: Visa exemption for Indian passport holders (made permanent in 2025).

countries.name: Malaysia
countries.notes: Visa-free entry for Indians extended through end of 2026.

countries.name: Singapore
countries.usVisaPerk: 96-hour Visa-Free Transit Facility when transiting with a valid US visa and onward ticket.

countries.name: Laos
countries.notes: Visa on arrival at major entry points.

countries.name: Philippines
countries.notes: e-Visa rollout for Indians in progress.
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry for 14 days with a valid US, Japan, Australia, Canada, Schengen, Singapore or UK visa.

countries.name: Timor-Leste
countries.notes: Visa on arrival at Dili airport.

countries.name: Macao
countries.notes: Visa-free entry for Indian passport holders.

countries.name: Taiwan
countries.notes: e-Visa or visitor visa normally required.
countries.usVisaPerk: Free online Travel Authorization Certificate (14 days) if you hold a valid or recently expired US visa.

countries.name: Japan
countries.notes: Tourist visa required (simplified e-Visa for Indians).

countries.name: South Korea
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free transit up to 30 days when entering with onward ticket to the US (conditions apply).

countries.name: China
countries.usVisaPerk: 240-hour visa-free transit at major airports with onward ticket to a third country.

countries.name: Qatar
countries.notes: Free visa on arrival for Indian passport holders.

countries.name: United Arab Emirates
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa on arrival (14 days, extendable) for Indians holding a valid US visa or green card.

countries.name: Oman
countries.notes: Unsponsored e-Visa for Indians requires a US/UK/Schengen visa or residence; 10-day visa-free entry announced for some categories.
countries.usVisaPerk: Eligible for the unsponsored tourist e-Visa only if you hold a valid US (or UK/Schengen) visa or residence card.

countries.name: Saudi Arabia
countries.notes: Standard tourist e-Visa not open to all Indian applicants.
countries.usVisaPerk: Eligible for the tourist e-Visa / visa on arrival if you hold a valid US visa (used at least once) or US green card.

countries.name: Bahrain
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa on arrival available for Indians with a valid US visa or green card.

countries.name: Kuwait
countries.usVisaPerk: e-Visa eligibility for Indians holding a valid US visa or green card.

countries.name: Jordan
countries.notes: Visa on arrival at airports (fee waived with Jordan Pass).

countries.name: Iran
countries.notes: Visa on arrival at airports; visa-free for groups announced.

countries.name: Turkey
countries.usVisaPerk: e-Visa (30 days, single entry) available only if you hold a valid US (or UK/Schengen/Ireland) visa or residence permit and arrive on an approved airline.

countries.name: Georgia
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry (90 days) for Indians holding a valid US visa or green card.

countries.name: Albania
countries.notes: Visa normally required (seasonal visa-free windows have applied).
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry (90 days) for Indians holding a valid multiple-entry US visa that has been used at least once.

countries.name: Montenegro
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry up to 30 days with a valid US visa.

countries.name: Bosnia and Herzegovina
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry up to 30 days for holders of a valid multiple-entry US visa.

countries.name: North Macedonia
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry up to 15 days with a valid US visa.

countries.name: Belarus
countries.notes: Visa-free entry via Minsk National Airport only (insurance + funds required).

countries.name: Schengen Area (EU)
countries.notes: Schengen short-stay visa required; covers 29 European countries.

countries.name: Kenya
countries.notes: Electronic Travel Authorisation (eTA) — visa regime abolished.

countries.name: Egypt
countries.notes: e-Visa or consular visa normally required.
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa on arrival (30 days) for Indians holding a valid US visa or residence permit.

countries.name: Morocco
countries.usVisaPerk: Expedited e-Visa track for holders of valid US/UK/Schengen visas.

countries.name: Seychelles
countries.notes: Visitor's permit issued on arrival (visa-free regime).

countries.name: Rwanda
countries.notes: Visa on arrival for all nationalities.

countries.name: Mozambique
countries.notes: Border visa for tourists where no embassy exists.

countries.name: Tunisia
countries.notes: Visa normally required for individual tourists.

countries.name: Sierra Leone
countries.notes: Visa on arrival at Freetown airport.

countries.name: Burundi
countries.notes: Visa on arrival at Bujumbura airport.

countries.name: Mauritania
countries.notes: Visa on arrival at Nouakchott airport.

countries.name: South Africa
countries.notes: Visitor visa required (TTOS trusted-tour-operator scheme for groups).

countries.name: Nigeria
countries.notes: e-Visa / visa on arrival approval needed in advance.

countries.name: United States
countries.notes: B1/B2 or other nonimmigrant visa required.

countries.name: Mexico
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry (180 days) for Indians holding a valid US visa or green card.

countries.name: Costa Rica
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry (up to the validity of your US visa, max 30–90 days) with a valid multiple-entry US visa or green card.

countries.name: Panama
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry (30–90 days) with a valid US visa (used at least once) or green card.

countries.name: Guatemala
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry with a valid US visa or residence.

countries.name: Honduras
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry with a valid US visa.

countries.name: Nicaragua
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa on arrival with a valid US visa.

countries.name: Belize
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa waived for holders of a valid US visa or green card.

countries.name: El Salvador
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry with a valid US visa.

countries.name: Colombia
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry (90 days) for Indians with a valid US visa (not C1 transit) or US/Schengen residence.

countries.name: Peru
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry (180 days) with a valid US, UK, Canada, Australia or Schengen visa/residence.

countries.name: Argentina
countries.usVisaPerk: AVE electronic travel authorization available to Indians holding a valid US visa or B2.

countries.name: Dominican Republic
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry with a valid US visa or green card.

countries.name: Bahamas
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa-free entry when arriving from the US with a valid US visa or green card.

countries.name: Bermuda
countries.notes: No Bermuda visa needed, but you must hold a valid US/UK/Canada visa to transit.
countries.usVisaPerk: Practical access requires a valid multi-entry US visa since most routes transit the US.

countries.name: Aruba
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa waived for Indians holding a valid US visa or US residence.

countries.name: Curaçao
countries.usVisaPerk: Visa waived with a valid US visa or US residence.
